name: BBQ Chicken with Lime BBQ Sauce Hbwk07a
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Celery - diced into 1/4 inch pieces
1 red bell pepper - medium, cut into 1/4 inch dice
1 medium Onion - diced into 1/4 inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Sweat the carrots in butter for 5 minutes.
2. Add the celery, onion, red bell pepper, and garlic to the pan.
3. In a medium saucepan, mix soy sauce, chicken stock, and vinegar.
4. Whisk in catsup, Dijon mustard, brown sugar, and salt.
5. Heat to simmer, dissolving sugar, and cook for 10 minutes.
6. Add vegetables and heat through.
7. Remove from heat and stir in lime juice.
8. Sear chicken on both sides and place in a shallow pan.
9. Pour marinade over the chicken; let marinate for at least 30 minutes, turning occasionally and basting.
10. Pour off marinade into saucepan; heat to boiling.
11. Grill chicken, basting until done.
12. Reduce sauce to half volume.
13. Serve over chicken.
14. Serve with Potato/Apple Salad. Yield: 6 servings.
